import pytest
from myapp.validation import validate_email, validate_password, validate_username

def test_valid_email():
    assert validate_email("user@example.com") is True

def test_invalid_email_format():
    assert validate_email("invalid") is False

def test_empty_email():
    assert validate_email("") is False

def test_strong_password():
    assert validate_password("Str0ng!Pass") is True

def test_weak_password():
    assert validate_password("weak") is False

def test_empty_password():
    assert validate_password("") is False

def test_valid_username():
    assert validate_username("alice") is True

def test_short_username():
    assert validate_username("a") is False

def test_username_with_special_chars():
    assert validate_username("user@name") is False
